name: End of Term Archive
description: The main coordinated effort to save U.S. Government websites at the end of presidential administrations. Focuses on websites and datasets.

name: Environmental Data & Governance Initiative (EDGI)
description: A research collaborative promoting evidence-based policy-making and public interest science. Focused on environmental data.

name: Harvard’s Library Innovation Lab Team
description: A team working on preserving public U.S. federal data, including an archive of data.gov on Source Cooperative.

name: ICPSR
description: An international consortium providing leadership and training in data access, curation, and methods of analysis for the social science research community.

name: IPUMS
description: Provides census and survey data from around the world integrated across time and space. Includes major US government data sources.

name: Dryad
description: A generalist repository available to help with data publication, storage, and preservation.

name: Webrecorder
description: Open source solutions to preserve modern, interactive websites exactly as they appear.

name: Wayback Machine
description: An initiative of the Internet Archive building a digital library of Internet sites and other cultural artifacts in digital form.

name: America's Essential Data
description: Collaborative effort dedicated to documenting the value that data produced by the federal government provides for American lives.

name: Policy Commons Open Collection
description: Initiative to identify, preserve, and make available government materials at risk of disappearing.

name: Stanford’s Big Local News
description: Produces the Federal data collection collaborative and helps with data liberation.

name: Data Liberation Project
description: Run by BigLocalNews and MuckRock, focused on liberating government data.

name: Silencing Science Tracker
description: Tracks government attempts to restrict scientific research, education, or discussion.

name: The LGBTQ+ Archive
description: Independent effort to preserve and make accessible information on health, legal rights, and safety for the LGBTQ+ community.

name: American Geophysical Union (AGU)
description: AGU highlights impactful datasets supporting research and decision making. Recently awarded a grant to convene the community for data resilience efforts.

name: Climate-Ocean Data Action Network (CDAN)
description: Informal coalition developing open guidance for safeguarding ocean-climate data and prioritizing preservation.
tags: ["Assesses risk to datasets","Proposes or generates proxy/ alternative datasets"]

name: Data Foundation - Climate Data Collaborative
description: Connects stakeholders to make climate and environmental data work better. Includes the GHG Coalition for U.S. GHG measurement.

name: Group on Reference Quality Data sets (GRQDs)
description: Focused on strategies for identifying and preserving at-risk Reference Quality Data sets that underpin climate science.

name: Keeling Curve Foundation (KCF)
description: Identifies priority long-term Earth system observations and established the Data Continuity Initiative for funding.

name: National Academies (NASEM) Earth Obs Workshop
description: Convenes community to exchange ideas on enhancing coordination and governance for Earth observations.

name: Cornerstone Data Initiative
description: Maintains and merges USEEIO and CEDA models for corporate carbon accounting globally.
tags: ["Archives and/or Mirrors","Proposes or generates proxy/ alternative datasets"]

name: FracTracker (Federal Accountability)
description: Supports communities investigating risks and documenting harms of oil and gas operations with data and mapping.

name: Environmental & Health Data & Analysis Trust
description: Meets critical analytical needs of state and local agencies related to environmental and health impacts.
tags: ["Archives and/or Mirrors","Proposes or generates proxy/ alternative datasets"]

name: New York Climate Exchange (NYCE)
description: Launched Climate Data Stewardship initiative to preserve and activate federal climate data.

name: Public Environmental Data Partners (PEDP)
description: Coalition mission to preserve, protect, and expand public access to climate and environmental data.
tags: ["Archives and/or Mirrors","Surfaces Priority Datasets","Assesses risk to datasets"]

name: The Data Rescue Project
description: Clearinghouse for at-risk U.S. government data, coordinating gathering, cleaning, and cataloging.

name: Climate.us
description: Successor to climate.gov, delivering climate data and information in accessible ways.

name: CODE (Center for Open Data Enterprise)
description: Advancing open government data through cross-sector convenings and partnerships.

name: The Impact Project
description: Nonpartisan data platform building tools to demonstrate the importance of public service.
tags: ["Surfaces Priority Datasets","Proposes or generates proxy/ alternative datasets"]

name: Harvard's Library Innovation Lab Team
description: A team working on preserving public U.S. federal data, including an archive of data.gov on Source Cooperative.

name: Stanford's Big Local News
description: Produces the Federal data collection collaborative and helps with data liberation.
